pests.name: Mushroom flies (Bradysia, Cecid fly, Phorid fly, Sciarid flies)
pests.solution: Construct a standard cultivation house with insect-resistant netting; maintain proper sanitation in cultivation houses; use neem water extract; use garlic and neem extract.

pests.name: Lycid beetle
pests.solution: Construct a standard cultivation house with insect-resistant netting; maintain proper sanitation in cultivation houses; use neem water extract; use garlic and neem extract.

diseases.name: Trichoderma infection
diseases.impact: Green spots visible on cultivation bags
diseases.solution: Use fresh, non-old raw materials; properly sterilize cultivation bags; use infection-free, well-grown spawn; disinfect before spawning and spawn in a clean, covered area; properly manage temperature and humidity during the growth period; remove and destroy infected cultivation bags.

diseases.name: Aspergillus niger infection
diseases.impact: Black spots visible on cultivation bags
diseases.solution: Use fresh, non-old raw materials; properly sterilize cultivation bags; use infection-free, well-grown spawn; disinfect before spawning and spawn in a clean, covered area; properly manage temperature and humidity during the growth period; remove and destroy infected cultivation bags.

diseases.name: Bacterial infections
diseases.solution: Apply 10g chlorine dissolved in 1 liter of water regularly at 3-5 day intervals.
